description.value: Aura moderate conjuration; CL 7th; Slot none; Price 12,392 gp; Weight 3 lbs. DESCRIPTION This +1 kusarigama makes a shrill whistling sound whenever it is used in combat. Once per day as a standard action, the wielder of Dancing Wasp can whirl the weapon above his head as a full-round action to summon a giant wasp. The wasp appears in the air above the wielderâs head and follows the wielderâs mental commands to the best of its ability as long as the user continues to twirl the weapon (requiring a standard action each round), to a maximum of 5 rounds, after which the wasp vanishes. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells summon monster IV or summon natureâs ally IV; Cost 6,352 gp
